_meta.resume_note: Negative result audited against San Joaquin Delta College's complete official 2025-2026 Certificates and Degrees (A-Z) inventory.

none_found_sources.locator: 2025-2026 San Joaquin Delta College Catalog: Certificates and Degrees (A-Z); the corresponding complete PDF inventory occupies pages 294-446

notes: No general Economics AA-T, AS-T, AA, or AS appears in the catalog's complete Certificates and Degrees inventory. The catalog index points Economics to the course-description section only, and Economics courses appear within other awards and general education; those uses do not create an Economics associate award.
